unlocks.name: Gargoyle Smasher
unlocks.desc: Gargoyles are automatically dealt the finishing blow if the player has a rock hammer in their inventory.

unlocks.name: Slug Salter
unlocks.desc: Rock slugs are automatically dealt the finishing blow if the player has a bag of salt in their inventory.

unlocks.name: Reptile Freezer
unlocks.desc: Desert lizards are automatically dealt the finishing blow if the player has an ice cooler in their inventory.

unlocks.name: 'Shroom Sprayer
unlocks.desc: Mutated zygomites are automatically dealt the finishing blow if the player has fungicide spray and fungicide in their inventory.

unlocks.name: Malevolent Masquerade
unlocks.desc: Learn to assemble a Slayer helmet, which requires level 55 Crafting.

unlocks.name: Ring Bling
unlocks.desc: Learn to craft a Slayer ring, which requires level 75 Crafting.

unlocks.name: Broader Fletching
unlocks.desc: Learn to fletch broad arrows (level 52 Fletching), broad bolts (level 55 Fletching), and amethyst broad bolts (level 76 Fletching).

unlocks.name: Seeing Red
unlocks.desc: Konar, Duradel, and Nieve will be able to assign you red dragons as your task.

unlocks.name: Watch the Birdie
unlocks.desc: Konar, Duradel, Nieve, Chaeldar, and Krystilia will be able to assign you Aviansie as your task. Requires level 60 Agility or 60 Strength to unlock.

unlocks.name: Hot Stuff
unlocks.desc: Duradel, Nieve, and Chaeldar will be able to assign TzHaar as your task. You will be offered a chance to slay TzTok-Jad.

unlocks.name: Like a Boss
unlocks.desc: Konar, Duradel, Krystilia, and Nieve will be able to assign boss monsters as your task, excluding: the Corporeal Beast, Yama, Nightmare, and Nex.

unlocks.name: Reptile Got Ripped
unlocks.desc: Konar, Duradel, Nieve, and Chaeldar will be able to assign Lizardmen as your task.

unlocks.name: Bigger and Badder
unlocks.desc: Certain Slayer monsters will have the chance of spawning a superior version whilst on a Slayer task.

unlocks.name: Duly Noted
unlocks.desc: Mithril dragons drop mithril bars in banknote form while killed on assignment.

unlocks.name: Stop the Wyvern
unlocks.desc: Stops you getting Fossil Island Wyvern tasks, without counting towards your blocked task limit. This does not cancel a current fossil wyvern task.

unlocks.name: Double Trouble
unlocks.desc: Slaying Dusk and Dawn now counts for two kills towards your task rather than one.

unlocks.name: Basilocked
unlocks.desc: Konar, Duradel, and Nieve will be able to assign Basilisks as your task.

unlocks.name: Actual Vampyre Slayer
unlocks.desc: Konar, Duradel, Nieve, and Chaeldar will be able to assign Vampyres as your task.

unlocks.name: Task Storage
unlocks.desc: Gain the ability to store your task. Once unlocked the operation is controlled by the tasks tab of the reward option. You can freely swap between your current task and stored task by using the reward

unlocks.name: I Wildy More Slayer
unlocks.desc: Krystilia will be able to assign Jellies, Dust Devils, Nechryaels, and Abyssal Demons as your task.

unlocks.name: Warped Reality
unlocks.desc: Konar, Duradel, Nieve, and Chaeldar will be able to assign Warped creatures as your task.

unlocks.name: Lured In
unlocks.desc: Nieve and Duradel will be able to assign Aquanites as your task.

unlocks.name: Wings Spread
unlocks.desc: Nieve and Duradel will be able to assign Gryphons as your task.

unlocks.name: Chance of Heavy Frost
unlocks.desc: Weighting increased from 5 to 8 for Frost dragon tasks from Nieve and Duradel.

unlocks.name: Need More Darkness
unlocks.desc: Number of dark beasts assigned is increased to 110-135.

unlocks.name: Ankou Very Much
unlocks.desc: Number of ankou assigned is increased to 91-150.

unlocks.name: Suq-a-nother One
unlocks.desc: Number of suqahs assigned is increased to 186-250.

unlocks.name: Fire & Darkness
unlocks.desc: Number of black dragons assigned is increased to 40-60.

unlocks.name: Pedal to the Metals
unlocks.desc: Number of metal dragons assigned is increased to 150-200.

unlocks.name: Spiritual Fervour
unlocks.desc: Number of spiritual creatures assigned is increased to 181-250.

unlocks.name: Augment my Abbies
unlocks.desc: Number of abyssal demons assigned is increased to 200-250.

unlocks.name: It's Dark in Here
unlocks.desc: Number of black demons assigned is increased to 200-250.

unlocks.name: Greater Challenge
unlocks.desc: Number of greater demons assigned is increased to 200-250.

unlocks.name: Bleed Me Dry
unlocks.desc: Number of bloodveld assigned is increased to 200-250.

unlocks.name: Smell Ya Later
unlocks.desc: Number of aberrant spectres assigned is increased to 200-250.

unlocks.name: Birds of a Feather
unlocks.desc: Number of aviansie assigned is increased to 200-250.

unlocks.name: Horrorific
unlocks.desc: Number of cave horrors assigned is increased to 200-250.

unlocks.name: To Dust You Shall Return
unlocks.desc: Number of dust devils assigned is increased to 200-250.

unlocks.name: Wyver-nother One
unlocks.desc: Number of Skeletal Wyverns assigned is increased to 50-75.

unlocks.name: Get Smashed
unlocks.desc: Number of gargoyles assigned is increased to 200-250.

unlocks.name: Nechs Please
unlocks.desc: Number of nechryael assigned is increased to 200-250.

unlocks.name: Krack On

unlocks.name: Get Scabaright on It

unlocks.name: Revenenenenenants

unlocks.name: More eyes than sense

unlocks.name: Let's Stay All Aquanite

unlocks.name: Gryphon and on
